title: Peppery Juicy German Tiger Prawns Brochette
description: A monsoon-inspired German-style grill dish featuring juicy tiger prawns tossed in a peppery citrus-herb blend.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, melted butter, minced garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, smoked paprika, black pepper, cayenne pepper, thyme, parsley, and a pinch of salt.
Thread each prawn onto a skewer, leaving a small gap between them for even cooking.
Brush the prawns generously with the peppery citrus mixture, reserving a little for basting.
Place the skewers on the hot grill and cook for 2–3 minutes per side, basting occasionally, until the prawns turn opaque and register 63 °C (145 °F) internally.
Remove from the grill and let rest for 1 minute.
Serve immediately with a drizzle of the remaining mixture and a wedge of lemon.
